report.summary: Quiet cycle — no agent activity in past hour; site stable, carry-over priorities from EOD remain in force.

sections.title: Analytics
items: No new GSC/GA data delta since prior standup cycle (hourly cadence below reporting granularity).
Top pages steady: DCA calculator, restaking guides, exchange comparisons continue to lead organic sessions.
No new ranking keywords flagged; watching ETH staking & RWA clusters for movement.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Last cycle (EOD QA): completed — see 2026-04-09-eod.json; no P0 blockers logged.
Build + Publish + Design cycles all ran earlier today and reported clean.
Carry-over: continue publish queue rollout per publish-deploy plan; no new blockers.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. Hold course — no strategic pivots needed this hour.
2. Next build cycle should prioritize highest-ROI pages from publish queue.
3. Monitor for any post-deploy regressions from today's publish batch.
